Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course examines the historical and contemporary roles of women as creators and professionals in the film and media industry, including 'Female Pioneers,' which relates to promoting productive employment and decent work for women (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course examines 'contemporary digital culture,' 'video games,' and 'Cyborgs,' which involves the analysis of information and communications technology (ICT) and innovation, aligning with the spirit of Target 9.c regarding technological advancement and its cultural impact.
